instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `bind-vars-star` that takes a list of (name value-form) bindings and a body. The bindings are SEQUENTIAL — each value-form is evaluated in the environment extended by all PREVIOUS bindings in the same form, so a later binding may reference an earlier one. Expansion uses LET*. Pairs with `bind-vars` (parallel, uses LET) — be careful which one is asked for.
